chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-325 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Ahad Manganhar advocate for applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = After hearing learned counsel for the applicant and perusing the observation recorded in the Order dated 18-12-2025, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is disposed of in the terms that the applicant is at liberty to avail her remedy in accordance with law by filing Direct Complaint before the Court having jurisdiction, if so advised. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
